summary: Iteration 50: Verified auto-tune framework for sigma overconfidence multiplier. All 14 backend API tests pass, all frontend UI features verified. Auto-tune is correctly disabled by default, shows MANUAL mode, current multiplier 1.25x, waiting for 30 resolved samples (5 collected). POST apply endpoint correctly returns 400 when disabled.

backend_api_tests: Auto-tune response has required fields: status, current_multiplier, recommended_multiplier, management_mode, auto_tune_enabled, mode_label, coverage_1sigma, total_valid, min_samples_required - PASS
Auto-tune status is 'insufficient_data' with 5 samples (needs 30) - PASS
Management mode is 'manual' when auto_tune_enabled=false - PASS
Mode label describes manual mode: 'Manual — operator controls the multiplier' - PASS
Auto_tune config fields verified: enabled=false, step_size=0.05, min_multiplier=1.0, max_multiplier=1.5, target_coverage=0.6827, min_samples=30, mode=manual - PASS
GET /api/config/strategies weather_trader has all auto-tune config fields - PASS
GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/metrics returns valid brier_score and coverage - PASS
Full auto-tune response structure matches expected types - PASS
Coverage 1σ is present when valid samples available (40.0%) - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Weather page loads with 54 open positions - PASS
All 9 tabs visible: Open Positions, Signals, Executions, Rejected, Forecasts, Calibration, Asymmetric, By Type, Health - PASS
Calibration tab shows 'Sigma Pipeline & Auto-Tune' section heading - PASS
Current Multiplier shows '1.25x' with ACTIVE badge - PASS
Management shows 'MANUAL' badge with 'Operator sets multiplier directly' text - PASS
Auto-Tune Recommendation shows 'Waiting for 30 resolved samples (5 collected)' - PASS
Asymmetric tab shows ENABLED config: Max Price 25¢, Min Model Prob 40%, Min Edge 15% - PASS
By Type tab shows all 4 types: TEMPERATURE (778/0 Buys/Closes), PRECIPITATION, SNOWFALL, WIND - PASS

details: mode_label='Manual — operator controls the multiplier' for UI display
current_multiplier=1.25, recommended_multiplier=1.25 (no change when insufficient data)
Error message: 'Auto-tune is disabled. Enable it first via config.'
Correct behavior - operator must explicitly enable auto-tune before applying
All values match WeatherConfig defaults from weather_models.py
'Sigma Pipeline & Auto-Tune' section heading clearly visible
Current Multiplier '1.25x' with ACTIVE badge shows widening is active
'Waiting for 30 resolved samples (5 collected)' explains why auto-tune not ready
Progress bar shows 5/30 samples collected with 'Blending' status
Auto-Tune DISABLED badge clearly indicates feature is off
Calibration metrics (Brier, Coverage, etc.) still displayed correctly

auto_tune_response.reason: Only 5/30 resolved samples — need more data

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (5 resolved forecast records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified the auto-tune framework for sigma overconfidence multiplier. Key findings: (1) Auto-tune is DISABLED by default (auto_tune_enabled=false in WeatherConfig). (2) System has 5 resolved samples but needs 30 for full auto-tune recommendations - status is 'insufficient_data'. (3) Management mode is 'manual' - operator controls the multiplier directly. (4) POST /apply endpoint correctly returns 400 with 'Auto-tune is disabled' message. (5) Config has all guardrails: step_size=0.05 (max change per step), min_multiplier=1.0, max_multiplier=1.5, target_coverage=68.27%. (6) Frontend shows all auto-tune info clearly: '1.25x ACTIVE' current multiplier, 'MANUAL' mode badge, 'Waiting for 30 resolved samples (5 collected)' recommendation, 'DISABLED' auto-tune badge. (7) All existing features work: Calibration, Asymmetric, By Type tabs all functional.
